events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need diagnose fault: confined space, no attendant posted, in-service, OSHA 1910.146. Confined space entry requires attendant outside. No attendant = non-compliant, high/critical risk. Decision fail. Need fill fields. Let's craft JSON.
